proposal.title: # Gauntlet recommendation to set MAI/MIMATIC isolated debt ceiling to 0 for Arbitrum, Avalanche, Polygon, Optimism v3
proposal.description:
# Gauntlet recommendation to set MAI/MIMATIC isolated debt ceiling to 0 for Arbitrum, Avalanche, Polygon, Optimism v3



__Author(s): Paul Lei, Watson Fu, Nick Del Zingaro, Walter Li, Jonathan Reem, Nick Cannon, Sarah Chen, Dana Tung__

## Summary

The AIP to freeze MAI/MIMATIC and set LTV -> 0 has been executed. This will prevent additional borrow and supply of MAI/MIMATIC, and additional borrow against MAI collateral outside of emode.

Given community preference for more caution, Gauntlet also recommends setting isolated debt ceilings to 0 for MAI/MIMATIC. This will further strengthen protection against potentially risky borrowing against MAI collateral.

Gauntlet is exploring ways to move MAI/MIMATIC out of emode for Avalanche and Polygon v3.



## Specification


| Chain | Asset | Action |
|-------|-------|-----|
| Arbitrum | MAI/MIMATIC | Set Debt Ceiling to 0
| Optimism | MAI/MIMATIC | Set Debt Ceiling to 0
| Avalanche | MAI/MIMATIC | Set Debt Ceiling to 0
| Polygon | MAI/MIMATIC | Set Debt Ceiling to 0


## Implementation

The proposal implements changes on Arbitrum, Optimism, Polygon, Avalanche v3 using the following pre-deployed payloads:
  - Arbitrum: [`0x32f3A6134590fc2d9440663d35a2F0a6265F04c4`](https://arbiscan.io/address/0x32f3A6134590fc2d9440663d35a2F0a6265F04c4)
  - Optimism: [`0x0568a3aeb8E78262dEFf75ee68fAC20ae35ffA91`](https://optimistic.etherscan.io/address/0x0568a3aeb8E78262dEFf75ee68fAC20ae35ffA91)
  - Polygon: [`0xf7C3350757DE224bdB2b77A3943C8667aCEE3d37`](https://polygonscan.com/address/0xf7C3350757DE224bdB2b77A3943C8667aCEE3d37)

Changes on Avalanche can be implemented using the pre-deployed steward located at [`0x0cb2535d00cddfae5ed1aff2e5a0239fc947d17d`](https://snowtrace.io/address/0x0cb2535d00cddfae5ed1aff2e5a0239fc947d17d)
